General.Name: China Resources Beer Holdings Co Ltd
General.Description: China Resources Beer (Holdings) Company Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures, distributes, and sells alcoholic beverages in Mainland China. It offers beer and baijiu products. The company was formerly known as China Resources Enterprise, Limited and changed its name to China Resources Beer (Holdings) Company Limited in October 2015. The company was incorporated in 1965 and is based in Wan Chai, Hong Kong. China Resources Beer (Holdings) Company Limited operates as a subsidiary of CRH (Beer) Limited.
General.Address: China Resources Building, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
